data.title: Matrixport withdrew 5,000 ETH from Binance half an hour ago
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Data Nerd monitored that about 30 minutes ago, Matrixport withdrew 5,000 ETH (about 13.01 million US dollars) from Binance and transferred it to the wallet starting with address 0x02a.

data.title: Jupiter Announces Completion of CWG Mission Amid DAO Transition
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Jupiter has announced on social media that after a comprehensive evaluation, the original four-year mission of the Core Working Group (CWG) has been largely completed. This decision comes as the DAO enters a six-month voting suspension and reset phase. Despite a few remaining tasks, the DAO ecosystem has evolved to a point where the initial framework of the CWG is no longer necessary, as it was designed for a different era of DAO.

Morten will join the Jupiter team full-time as an operations and quality control engineer. Kemo will return to lead his project, Radiants, while maintaining his role as a community member. The remaining members will complete their work transitions within two weeks. The CWG has decided to return 4.5 million JUP tokens in full to the DAO treasury.

data.title: LBank released its second quarter report: the average daily trading volume reached 4.98 billion US dollars, and the market share and 100-fold coin ratio of Meme ranked first among CEXs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News LBank released the second quarter 2025 platform report. The data showed that its average daily trading volume reached 4.98 billion US dollars, a month-on-month increase of 24.5%, setting a record high. The report shows that the platform ranks first in CEX platforms in terms of the proportion of 100-fold coins, the increase in the first-time asset and the market share of Meme coins with its efficient asset screening and listing mechanism.
The report said that LBank launched a total of 329 assets this quarter, of which 29% were first-time projects, with an average increase of 912%; 187 Meme assets were launched, accounting for 57%, of which 13% had a return of more than 10 times, and the proportion of 100-fold assets was 1.07%. The platform also launched the "EDGE Zone", focusing on high-quality and high-potential assets. The average increase of the first 13 projects reached 1564%.
In addition, LBank launched 7 assets for pre-market trading, with the highest return reaching 123 times; the yield of the Launchpool project Stakestone was as high as 400%; a total of 35 rounds of airdrops were issued, with a total value of US$6 million. In terms of security, the platform has defended more than 2,000 potential incidents and prevented losses of more than US$250 million.
In terms of global layout, LBank has held many brand events in Dubai, Hong Kong and other places, and participated in industry conferences such as Bitcoin2025. The platform has won many industry awards and has been reported by media such as The Wall Street Journal and Forbes, and its brand influence continues to increase.

data.title: Bitget and Veles reach strategic cooperation to jointly create smart trading experience
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Itget has reached a strategic cooperation with the automated trading platform Veles. After this integration, Bitget users will be able to directly use the intelligent trading robots provided by Veles to realize automated execution of strategies in the spot and contract markets, and comprehensively improve trading efficiency and risk control capabilities. This cooperation is an important part of Bitget's creation of an intelligent and convenient trading tool system, aiming to bring a more efficient and robust trading experience to individual and institutional users.
Users can quickly access Bitget through Veles' Fast-API, customize technical indicators and trading signals, and flexibly respond to changing market environments. The platform supports dynamic risk management functions, including stop loss recovery, multiple stop profit, and trailing stop profit, etc., to help users accurately control risk exposure and profit expectations. At the same time, Veles is equipped with a professional backtesting engine that can optimize strategies based on historical data analysis to help improve overall trading performance.
Vladislav Kriger, CEO of Veles Finance, said: "We hope that through this cooperation, we can bring more practical automated trading tools to a wider user group, help them more efficiently respond to market fluctuations, and improve the usability of complex strategies."

data.title: An Ethereum 1CO participant transferred 1,000 ETH to Kraken, with a floating profit of $26 million and still holding 3,000 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, an early Ethereum 1CO participant transferred 1,000 ETH to Kraken, which is worth about $2.6 million at the current price. The address received a total of 100,000 ETH at $31,100 during the 1CO period, and currently still holds 3,000 ETH, with a paper profit of about $7.79 million.

data.title: The “Insider Whale” suffered another liquidation loss of $381,000, and the remaining short positions are still on the verge of liquidation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa, as BTC broke through $110,000, the "insider whale" was liquidated again. 1,389.63 ETH and 47.45 BTC were liquidated 5 minutes ago, resulting in a loss of $381,000. Currently, the remaining position of its BTC and ETH short orders is $35.44 million, with a floating loss of about $1.54 million, still close to the liquidation line.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming continues to buy about $7.09 million in ETH, and the old OG address sells more than $10 million in reverse
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @lookonchain monitoring, SharpLink Gaming announced yesterday that it had purchased 198,167 ETH (about 517 million US dollars) at an average price of about 2,608 US dollars, and today it purchased an additional 2,738 ETH (about 7.09 million US dollars) through OTC.
At the same time, the old Ethereum address 0xe592 transferred 4,123 ETH (about 10.51 million US dollars) to Gemini today. The address had purchased 21,664 ETH at an average price of 573 US dollars in 2017-2018.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Experiences $319 Million Liquidation in 24 Hours
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Coinglass reveals that the cryptocurrency market witnessed liquidations totaling $319 million over the past 24 hours. Of this amount, long positions accounted for $45.28 million, while short positions saw liquidations amounting to $274 million.

data.title: Newland Secures U.S. MSB License for Financial Services Expansion
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Newland announced on July 3 that it has obtained a U.S. Money Services Business (MSB) license. This federal-level financial compliance license, issued by the Financial Crimes Enforcement Network (FinCEN) of the U.S. Department of the Treasury, covers activities such as currency exchange, remittances, and digital currency transactions.

FinCEN guidelines classify the transmission and receipt of stablecoins as money transmission services, requiring registration for an MSB license and adherence to anti-money laundering obligations. Newland plans to apply for and register payment licenses in other relevant regions as part of its strategy to expand its global business. The company aims to enhance its competitive edge by providing superior, secure, and efficient cross-border financial and payment services to customers worldwide.

data.title: Tianyang Technology Explores Stablecoin Applications in Cross-Border Payments
data.description: According to Foresight News, Tianyang Technology announced on July 3 via an interactive platform that it currently has no business collaboration with Guotai Junan International. However, the company is actively working with several licensed overseas financial institutions to explore the practical applications of stablecoins in cross-border payments and virtual credit card sectors. Tianyang Technology is committed to advancing the technological implementation of these initiatives.

data.title: Apple and Microsoft Advance Quantum-Resistant Encryption in Upcoming Software Updates
data.description:
According to ShibDaily, Apple Inc. has announced that its forthcoming operating system updates for Mac will feature support for quantum-secure key exchange algorithms. This enhancement aims to provide improved encryption when connecting to TLS 1.3 servers that offer similar security measures. The announcement was made during Apple's recent Worldwide Developers Conference, where the company detailed its plans to integrate quantum-resistant encryption into its upcoming software. While the new systems will support quantum-secure key exchange, they will maintain compatibility with existing servers by defaulting to traditional algorithms when necessary.

Quantum-resistant encryption involves advanced cryptographic methods designed to withstand potential attacks from powerful quantum computers, which could eventually compromise traditional encryption. As quantum computing technology advances, current security systems may become susceptible to breaches. Implementing quantum-resistant algorithms is a proactive measure to ensure long-term data protection across digital communications and financial systems. Apple's next wave of operating systems, including iOS 26, iPadOS 26, macOS Tahoe 26, and visionOS 26, is expected to launch during the company's Fall product event in September. These updates will extend Apple's post-quantum cryptography (PQC) capabilities beyond iMessage, which received PQC support last year, by enabling secure communication with compatible external servers.

Meanwhile, Microsoft Corporation is also advancing its post-quantum cryptography (PQC) efforts by incorporating it into the next version of Windows 11. Early access to this version is now available through the Windows Insider program. The release includes support for ML-KEM, a key encapsulation method derived from the CRYSTALS-Kyber algorithm, and ML-DSA, a digital signature scheme based on the CRYSTALS-Dilithium algorithm. These additions represent a significant step in preparing Windows for future threats posed by quantum computing. As the digital landscape continues to evolve, major tech companies are positioning themselves at the forefront of cybersecurity innovation. With quantum computing on the horizon, the race to future-proof data privacy is accelerating, and the operating systems of tomorrow are already laying the groundwork.

data.title: Hamak Gold Limited Secures £2.467 Million Through Share Placement
data.description:
According to PANews, Hamak Gold Limited, a publicly listed company in the UK, has announced the successful raising of £2.467 million through direct subscription and a share placement facilitated by Peterhouse Capital. The company issued 308,375,000 new ordinary shares at a price of £0.008 per share, representing a 27% discount from the closing price on July 2. Two new directors contributed £200,000 to the subscription, while two non-executive directors have resigned. Key investors include a private investment entity associated with Sheik Nayef Bin Eid Al Thani of the Qatari royal family.

The company plans to allocate part of the funds to debt repayment and operational capital enhancement, with the remainder directed towards implementing a Bitcoin asset management strategy. Newly appointed Chairman Nick Thurlow stated that the company will focus on both gold exploration and digital asset management strategies, ensuring transparency, institutional-grade security, and governance through its listing on the main board of the London Stock Exchange.

data.title: Trader Issues Urgent Bitcoin Alert, Says BTC Indicator That’s Predicted Major Crashes Is Flashing Red – Here Are His Targets
data.description:
Crypto trader and analyst Ali Martinez is warning that Bitcoin (BTC) could undergo a significant correction amid a bearish signal from a reliable indicator. Martinez tells his 139,100 followers on the social media platform X that the Tom DeMark (TD) Sequential indicator is suggesting that Bitcoin could fall by over 63% from the current level.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/03/trader-issues-urgent-bitcoin-alert-says-btc-indicator-thats-predicted-major-crashes-is-flashing-red-here-are-his-targets/
